title: Make spawn operation_id ignore run drift
goal: Fix issue #13 spawn idempotency gap so an explicit operation_id deduplicates repeated swarm spawn retries even when the tool generated a fresh run_id on each attempt.
requiredInputs: Observed key currently includes generated run_id when nonce is present
permissions: Modify spawn mutation key and focused tests
Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: When request_nonce/operation_id is present, spawn_mutation_key ignores payload drift including generated run_id drift.
Without request_nonce, spawn_mutation_key remains payload/run scoped to avoid merging independent default spawns.
Focused comm_session spawn mutation key regression test, cargo fmt/check, git diff --check, and selfdev build pass.
Governance gate passes and the exact slice is committed and pushed.
failureTaxonomy: Breaking default spawn behavior without operation_id
Reusing non-operation-id spawn keys too broadly
Changing swarm member run_id storage for successful first spawn
Over-expanding into assign_next or SwarmRun persistence
notes: Keep this slice limited to spawn mutation key semantics and focused tests. Follow-up can address server-side assign_next/retry operation IDs separately.
